operator_boundary: Agents must not restart/kill/reload the Hermes gateway; served runtime rollback is operator-supervised.

steps.dry_run_action: Mark controlled beta paused and stop inviting new testers until the incident owner clears the blocker.
steps.name: pause_first_10_invites

steps.dry_run_action: If a release is harmful, yank the bad file on PyPI, pin the prior known-good version in docs, and publish a status note.
steps.name: pypi_bad_release_response

steps.dry_run_action: Do not kill the gateway from an agent session; operator runs fingerprint/canary and supervised rollback/reload.
steps.name: served_mcp_operator_rollback

steps.dry_run_action: Record the bad guidance via bad-answer issue plus borg_record_failure; disable or narrow the matching path before more testers.
steps.name: bad_guidance_disable_path

steps.dry_run_action: Update docs/public/status.json and PUBLIC_SELF_SERVE_LAUNCH_GO_NO_GO with the incident state.
steps.name: public_status_update

steps.dry_run_action: Send affected testers a concise notice: what happened, whether secrets were involved, current workaround, and next update time.
steps.name: user_notification_template
